title: Holy Rebellion of '06
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Cut|canon=1|Star Wars drafts}}
The '''Holy Rebellion of '06''' was a conflict that occurred around the time of the fall of the [[Republica Galactica]] and the establishment of the [[Galactic Empire|First Galactic Empire]].

The [[Knights of Sith|Black Knights of the Sith]], a [[Mercenary|mercenary]] band, hunted down and nearly destroyed the [[Jedi-Bendu|Jedi Bendu]] of [[Light side of the Force|Ashla]], the defenders of the old Republica. The Sith, originally [[Pirate|pirates]], had been taught the powers of the [[Dark side of the Force|Bogan]] by a fallen Jedi named [[Darklighter]]. The Sith became the Imperial bodyguard and grew to dominate the Empire.

[[Kane Starkiller]] was one of the last Jedi survivors of the rebellion.

==Behind the scenes==
This account, the first mention of the events which became the [[Great Jedi Purge]] in the films, was part of the [[Adventures of the Starkiller, Episode I: The Star Wars|second draft]] to the original film. It was later simplified and the "Holy Rebellion" was eliminated.

==Sources==
